overall.description: A nighttime walk through a futuristic cyberpunk street market in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring neon lighting, holographic advertisements, wet pavement, and pedestrians with umbrellas. The camera moves steadily forward past market stalls and under a large spherical stadium structure.

pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera

makeshift tents and stalls with striped awnings lining the left side of the street
futuristic skyscrapers with vertical neon lighting and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy cyberpunk street market at night, with a prominent red neon grill in the foreground. The camera walks forward past market stalls on the left while pedestrians walk through the scene. A large Watson holographic sign and neon-lit skyscrapers dominate the background skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market area approaching spherical stadium structure

events.description: pedestrian with glowing blue umbrella enters view from the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the market crowd toward the stadium

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying a glowing blue umbrella walking toward the camera
person in gray shirt and dark pants walking past on the right

entered.detail: large geodesic dome structure with purple neon lighting on the right side

segments.scene_description: Moving past the initial grill area, the scene opens up to reveal a large spherical stadium structure on the right with purple neon lighting. The camera continues walking through moderate crowds, passing a pedestrian with a distinctive glowing blue umbrella and others walking through the wet market street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway under spherical stadium

events.description: moving under the large spherical stadium structure with metal framework overhead

agents.ego_description: walking under the stadium structure through the market crowd

notable_agents.action: person in dark jacket walking past on the left side
pedestrian with red umbrella walking toward the camera

entered.detail: metal support beams and framework of the spherical structure overhead with purple lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the massive spherical stadium structure, entering a semi-covered area with metal framework overhead illuminated by purple neon lights. The market continues beneath the structure with pedestrians carrying umbrellas walking through the sheltered walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a rainy cyberpunk market that transitions from an open street into the sheltered underbelly of a massive stadium. It begins by passing a prominent red neon grill and various market stalls, with the camera gliding past pedestrians under a skyline dominated by neon skyscrapers and a large Watson holographic sign. As the camera advances, the view opens up to reveal a towering spherical stadium glowing with purple neon light on the right, while a pedestrian with a glowing blue umbrella cuts through the wet street. The scene then shifts as the camera moves directly under the stadium's massive structure, entering a semi-covered walkway defined by an overhead metal framework. Finally, the movement continues through this sheltered area, where the purple illumination persists over the crowds of umbrella-carrying pedestrians.
